_about: Hand overrides for THE ORIGINALS. track_pick forces the definitive cut where the automatic club/extended preference would miss it; video_pick pins an oembed-validated official upload where the pinned original pressing carries no page video; row_note names the 2026 rework and links back to the sibling playlist.

video_note.1: official New Order upload of the full 1983 12" (the page's own clip is a whole-EP rip)

row_note.1: The synth-pop cornerstone that taught dance music the 12". **Reworked in 2026** by Richie Hawtin → [Remix Rave #1](../remix-rave/remix-rave.md).
row_note.2: Rufus & Chaka Khan's 1983 hook, endlessly sampled by house. **Reworked in 2026** by Beta Rox → [Remix Rave #2](../remix-rave/remix-rave.md).
row_note.3: Belgian new-beat/proto-trance touchstone. **Reworked in 2026** by Age Of Love & Hysta → [Remix Rave #3](../remix-rave/remix-rave.md).
row_note.4: Bleep-techno monster off '808:90'. **Reworked in 2026** by Technikal → [Remix Rave #4](../remix-rave/remix-rave.md).
row_note.5: Cajual vocal-house anthem with Dajae. **Reworked in 2026** by Harry Romero → [Remix Rave #5](../remix-rave/remix-rave.md).
row_note.6: AATW rave-euphoria staple. **Reworked in 2026** by Kyle Starkey + Dart → [Remix Rave #6](../remix-rave/remix-rave.md).
row_note.7: Janice Robinson's voice on the '94 house smash. **Re-recorded in 2026** by Janice Robinson herself → [Remix Rave #7](../remix-rave/remix-rave.md).
row_note.8: Piano-trance that crossed to the pop charts. **Reworked in 2026** by Steve Hill & Technikal → [Remix Rave #8](../remix-rave/remix-rave.md).
row_note.9: Balearic guitar-trance landmark. **Reworked in 2026** by Chicane & Larse → [Remix Rave #9](../remix-rave/remix-rave.md).
row_note.10: Italo-house diva anthem (and eternal football chant). **Reworked in 2026** by Basswar & Caox X Bitshakerz → [Remix Rave #10](../remix-rave/remix-rave.md).
row_note.11: Sheffield trip-house turned floor-filler. **Reworked in 2026** by Hardt Antoine → [Remix Rave #11](../remix-rave/remix-rave.md).
row_note.12: Its riff + Coco's 'I Need A Miracle' hook became 'Toca's Miracle'. **Reworked in 2026** by Rave Republic & Fragma → [Remix Rave #12](../remix-rave/remix-rave.md).
row_note.13: The Eurotrance robot-vocal monster. **Reworked in 2026** by Bezerk → [Remix Rave #13](../remix-rave/remix-rave.md).
row_note.14: Big-beat call to the dancefloor. **Reworked in 2026** by Fatboy Slim, Topic & Marco Generani → [Remix Rave #14](../remix-rave/remix-rave.md).
